description_long: This object consists of two large mushrooms with thick, cylindrical stems and broad, domed caps. The caps are a muted blue color with scattered white spots, giving them a whimsical, fairy-tale appearance. The stems are a natural tan color, slightly textured, and taper gently toward the ground. Both mushrooms are rooted in a cracked, dry earth substrate, suggesting a parched urban park or garden bed. The larger mushroom stands taller and more upright, while the smaller one is lower and slightly tilted. The surface of the caps appears matte and somewhat rough, with no visible gills from these angles.
description: A pair of large, blue-capped mushrooms with white spots and tan stems, set on cracked dry ground. The caps are domed and matte, with a whimsical, fairy-tale look.
description_view_0: The larger mushroom dominates the view, with its cap partially shadowing the smaller mushroom behind it. The cracked earth is clearly visible.
description_view_1: Both mushrooms are visible side by side, with the taller mushroom on the left and the smaller one on the right, showing their relative sizes.
description_view_2: The mushrooms are aligned front to back, highlighting the height difference and the broadness of the larger cap.
description_view_3: The two mushrooms are seen from the opposite side, with the smaller mushroom in the foreground and the larger one behind, both caps clearly visible.
